tell me about ODM college
about college
responses: ODM College stands for Ompati Devi Memorial College located in Hisar, Haryana.

responses: ODM College for Women is located 12KM Stone, NH-52, Rajgarh Road, Muklan-Hisar district, Haryana, India.

patterns: When was ODM College established?
In which year was ODM College founded?
What is the establishment year of ODM College?
Since when is ODM College running?
How old is ODM College?
responses: ODM College was established in 2019 to promote quality higher education for women in Hisar.

responses:
The Vice Principal of ODM College for Women, Muklan (Hisar) is Mrs. Shashi Bala.

For more official details, please contact the college office or visit the official website www.odmcollege.com.

responses: ODM College is managed under DHE Govt. of Haryana guidelines and operates as a private women college.

patterns: Why is the aim of ODM College?
What was the aim of establishing ODM College?
What is the mission of ODM College?
What is the vision of ODM College?
responses: The aim of establishing ODM College is to provide quality education, empower women, and promote academic excellence in Hisar region.

patterns: Is ODM College affiliated with any university?
Which university is ODM College affiliated to?
Is ODM College approved by DHE Haryana?
Is ODM College recognized by UGC?
responses: ODM College is affiliated as per DHE Govt. of Haryana guidelines and follows Guru Jambeshwar University of Science & Technolog regulations for higher education.

responses:
NSS stands for National Service Scheme.

NSS is available at ODM College for Women, Muklan. It is a government-sponsored program that encourages students to participate in community service activities like cleanliness drives, blood donation camps, awareness programs, plantation drives, and social welfare activities.

Students can join NSS to develop leadership skills, social responsibility, and personality development.

responses:
NCC stands for National Cadet Corps.

NCC is available at ODM College for Women, Muklan.

Students can join NCC to develop discipline, leadership, and patriotism. NCC provides training, camps, and certificates (A, B, and C certificates).

NCC certificates are helpful for government jobs and defense services.

For joining procedure and eligibility details, please contact the college office.
